summary: The IDF announced the death of a reserve soldier, Master Sgt. (res.) Basil Sweid, 32, from the 7th Armored Brigade, in an operational accident when his refueling truck overturned in the Rab al-Thalathine area of southern Lebanon. An Israeli military source stated Israel has withdrawn from parts of the Yellow Line in southern Lebanon, with the Lebanese Army set to deploy in the vacated areas. The Iranian negotiating team considers Israeli withdrawal from occupied Lebanese territories a key condition and a red line for any final agreement.
key_points: IDF confirmed the death of reserve soldier Master Sgt. Basil Sweid, 32, in an operational accident when his refueling truck overturned in the Rab al-Thalathine area of southern Lebanon, also injuring another soldier. (Source: @manniefabian/58677)

An Israeli military source reported Israel has withdrawn from parts of the Yellow Line in southern Lebanon, with the Lebanese Army scheduled to deploy in the vacated zones. (Source: @inon_yttach/9161)
The Iranian negotiating team stated that Israeli withdrawal from occupied Lebanese territories is a key condition and a red line for any final agreement. (Source: @naya_foriraq/79877)

Israeli military radio reported the IDF is reducing forces in southern Lebanon, pulling some combat units for rehabilitation and readiness inside Israeli territory, and will soon rotate brigades between Gaza and Lebanon. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/372801)
IDF eliminated Islamic Jihad commander Adnan Muhammad Ibrahim Abu Hadaid, head of the organization's production array, in a precision strike in Khan Younis, Gaza. (Source: @inon_yttach/9158)

Iranian Petroleum Minister Mohsen Paknejad at BRICS called for the withdrawal of all US military forces from West Asia and dismantling of American bases as the only path to global energy stability. (Source: @presstv/195618)
A US airstrike on terror positions in Diyala Province, Iraq, eliminated three IRGC-backed PMU/Hashed Al Sha'abi elements following explosions in the area. (Source: @shin_persian/7197)
Hamas warned Israel against any new attempts to forcibly displace Palestinians from the Gaza Strip. (Source: @presstv/195604)

sections.executive_summary: The IDF confirmed the death of reserve soldier Master Sgt. Basil Sweid in an operational vehicle accident in southern Lebanon's Rab al-Thalathine area. An Israeli source reported Israeli forces have withdrawn from parts of the Yellow Line in southern Lebanon with Lebanese Army deployment planned. The Iranian negotiating team designated Israeli withdrawal from Lebanese occupied territories as a red-line condition for any final agreement.

points: Iranian Petroleum Minister Mohsen Paknejad at BRICS called for the withdrawal of all US military forces from West Asia and dismantling of American bases as the only path to global energy stability. (Source: @presstv/195618)

A source close to the Iranian negotiating team stated that Israeli withdrawal from occupied Lebanese territories is a condition of the final agreement and is considered an important red line by the Iranian team. (Source: @naya_foriraq/79877)

According to SharghDaily, a source close to the Iranian negotiating team said Israeli withdrawal from occupied Lebanese territories is a condition of the final agreement and considered a red line; a final memorandum of understanding would guarantee Lebanese sovereignty and territorial integrity. (Source: @SharghDaily/168071)

SharghDaily reported that over the past six days the volume of attacks on Lebanon has decreased significantly, which the source indicated shows Iran's actions have been effective, but the Islamic Republic will not be satisfied with anything less than a permanent ceasefire and complete Israeli withdrawal. (Source: @SharghDaily/168071)
Iranian officials threatened Israel, saying if Israel does not withdraw from Lebanon willingly today, tomorrow it will have to flee in shame and utter defeat. (Source: @almogboker78/17589)

The IDF announced the death of reserve soldier Master Sgt. (res.) Basil Sweid, 32, a truck driver in the 7th Armored Brigade's 75th Battalion from Peki'in, when his refueling truck overturned in the Rab al-Thalathine area of southern Lebanon around 11 p.m., also moderately injuring another combat soldier. (Source: @manniefabian/58677)

An Israeli military source reported to Reuters that Israel has withdrawn from parts of the Yellow Line in southern Lebanon, with the Lebanese Army set to deploy in the areas of withdrawal. (Source: @inon_yttach/9161)

Israeli military radio announced the IDF is reducing its forces in southern Lebanon, taking out some combat units for rehabilitation and readiness raising inside Israeli territory, and will execute rotation of brigades between Gaza and Lebanon soon. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/372801)

IDF confirmed it eliminated Adnan Muhammad Ibrahim Abu Hadaid, a commander in the Islamic Jihad (PIJ) production array responsible for producing and supplying all means of combat for the organization's military wing, in a precision strike in Khan Younis, Gaza Strip. (Source: @almogboker78/17588)

IDF Chief of Staff Lt. Gen. Nir Shaphir stated at a officers' course graduation ceremony: 'We need every fighter and every commander. This people has no other army, and this army has no other people. The IDF is the army of the people, the army of the Jewish state.' (Source: @N12chat/214655)

IDF eliminated Adnan Muhammad Ibrahim Abu Hadaid, a commander in the Islamic Jihad production array in Khan Younis, Gaza; the production array is responsible for producing and supplying all means of combat for the organization's military wing. (Source: @inon_yttach/9158)
Hamas warned Israel of any new attempts to forcibly displace Palestinians from the Gaza Strip. (Source: @presstv/195604)
Israeli forces mistreated Palestinians at a checkpoint set up at the western entrance of the town of Al-Mughayyir, northeast of Ramallah. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/372791)
An Israeli military source indicated that brigade rotations will be executed between Gaza and Lebanon, with some brigades moving north and others south. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/372801)

IDF confirmed the death of reserve soldier Master Sgt. Basil Sweid, 32, from the 7th Armored Brigade, when his refueling truck overturned in the Rab al-Thalathine area of southern Lebanon around 11 p.m. (Source: @manniefabian/58677)
An Israeli military source reported Israel has withdrawn from parts of the Yellow Line in southern Lebanon, with the Lebanese Army set to deploy in the vacated areas. (Source: @inon_yttach/9161)
Israeli military radio announced the IDF is reducing forces in southern Lebanon, pulling some combat units for rehabilitation and readiness inside Israeli territory. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/372801)

Hezbollah Secretary General Sheikh Naim Qasum began his speech at the central Ashura council at the shrine of Sayyid Shuhada al-Ummah, Sayyid Hassan Nasrallah, in the southern suburbs of Beirut. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/372797)

According to a source close to the Iranian negotiating team, Israeli withdrawal from occupied Lebanese territories is a condition of the final agreement and a red line; a final memorandum of understanding would guarantee Lebanese sovereignty and territorial integrity with Iranian participation in the Swiss text. (Source: @SharghDaily/168071)

SharghDaily reported that over the past six days the volume of attacks on Lebanon has decreased significantly, which was described as showing Iran's actions have been effective. (Source: @SharghDaily/168071)
An explosion was reported in Al-Muqaddadiyyah in Diyala Province, Iraq. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/372787)
Following explosions in Diyala Province, three IRGC-backed PMU/Hashed Al Sha'abi elements were eliminated in a US Air Force airstrike on terror positions in Iraq. (Source: @shin_persian/7197)

At least three vessels, including two large oil tankers, diverted from their course while attempting to pass through the Strait of Hormuz via the route parallel to the coast of Oman, according to Bloomberg. (Source: @SharghDaily/168069)

A maritime incident was reported off the coast of Oman; a cargo vessel was reportedly hit by a projectile 7.5 nautical miles southeast of the 'Dahit' area of Oman and sustained damage. (Source: @SharghDaily/168063)
UKMTO issued Warning 074-26 regarding an attack in the region. (Source: @shin_persian/7199)
Omani Foreign Minister stated that future arrangements for the Strait of Hormuz do not include the collection of transit fees. (Source: @yediotnews25/131930)
IRGC Navy fired a projectile and struck a civilian cargo ship in the Gulf of Oman that had not submitted passage approvals. (Source: @pkpoi/142970)

key_developments: IDF confirmed the death of reserve soldier Master Sgt. Basil Sweid, 32, from the 7th Armored Brigade, in an operational accident when his refueling truck overturned in the Rab al-Thalathine area of southern Lebanon. (Source: @manniefabian/58677)
An Israeli military source reported Israel has withdrawn from parts of the Yellow Line in southern Lebanon, with the Lebanese Army set to deploy in the vacated areas. (Source: @inon_yttach/9161)
The Iranian negotiating team stated Israeli withdrawal from occupied Lebanese territories is a condition of the final agreement and considered an important red line. (Source: @naya_foriraq/79877)
IDF eliminated Islamic Jihad commander Adnan Muhammad Ibrahim Abu Hadaid, head of the production array, in a precision strike in Khan Younis, Gaza Strip. (Source: @almogboker78/17588)
Israeli military radio announced the IDF is reducing forces in southern Lebanon and will execute brigade rotations between Gaza and Lebanon soon. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/372801)
Iranian Petroleum Minister at BRICS called for withdrawal of all US military forces from West Asia and dismantling of American bases for global energy stability. (Source: @presstv/195618)
A US airstrike in Diyala Province, Iraq, eliminated three IRGC-backed PMU/Hashed Al Sha'abi elements following explosions in the area. (Source: @shin_persian/7197)
sections.threat_assessment: The operational accident in southern Lebanon's Rab al-Thalathine area that killed a 7th Armored Brigade reserve soldier underscores ongoing risks in the Lebanese theater even as the IDF reduces its presence there. The reported Israeli withdrawal from parts of the Yellow Line in southern Lebanon, coupled with the Iranian team's insistence on full withdrawal as a red line, suggests active diplomatic negotiations over Lebanese territory. The elimination of an Islamic Jihad production array commander in Khan Younis indicates continued Israeli counterterror operations in Gaza. The Diyala Province US airstrike targeting IRGC-backed PMU elements signals expanding US-Iran proxy friction in Iraq.
sections.regional_response: Iran has positioned itself as a key stakeholder in Lebanon's future, with its negotiating team treating Israeli withdrawal from occupied Lebanese territories as a non-negotiable condition and red line. The Iranian Petroleum Minister used the BRICS platform to call for removal of all US military bases from West Asia, linking regional military presence to global energy security. Hezbollah's Secretary General delivered a speech at the central Ashura council in Beirut's southern suburbs, maintaining organizational messaging amid the reported ceasefire reduction in attacks on Lebanon over the past six days. The US Senate voted 50-47 to oppose a war powers resolution on Iran, with President Trump framing the vote as a warning to Iran.
sections.intelligence_notes: The reported reduction of IDF forces in southern Lebanon and rotation of brigades between Gaza and Lebanon suggests a broader Israeli military restructuring across multiple fronts. The decrease in attacks on Lebanon over six days correlates with Iranian claims of effective diplomatic pressure, though verification of a formal ceasefire arrangement remains unclear. The IRGC Navy's reported strike on an unapproved civilian cargo vessel in the Gulf of Oman, combined with tanker diversions from the Strait of Hormuz, indicates escalating maritime security risks in Gulf waterways. The US airstrike in Diyala Province targeting IRGC-backed PMU elements represents direct US action against Iranian proxy forces in Iraq, with potential for further escalation.
